articles.title: Teams, results and all info from The Champions Arena!
articles.snippet: 2019 Korea National Champion Hyungwoo Shin has won his second VR tournament! Hyungwoo defeated 2025 World Cup Champions Team Spain's Jorge Tabuyo in the finals of The Champions Arena, our first…

articles.title: A new wave of the Samurott the Unrivaled 7★ Tera Raid Battle event is live!
articles.snippet: This Tera Raid Battle event lasts until 23 April. Samurott the Unrivaled was last featured in April 2023, so take this chance to catch it if you didn't back then!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Indianapolis Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Indianapolis Regional Championships, the first major event in North America to be played with Pokémon Champions, held on 30–31 May 2026!

articles.title: Sign-ups for NAIC are open again!
articles.snippet: The most important tournament this season in North America is here! All you need to know about NAIC, held on 12–14 June 2026, to be played for the first time with Pokémon Champions!

articles.title: Sign-ups for NAIC are open!
